error.signature: java.lang.OutOfMemoryError: GC overhead limit exceeded during Gradle build
error.regex: (OutOfMemoryError.*GC overhead|OutOfMemoryError.*Gradle|Java heap space.*gradle|Metaspace.*gradle|GC overhead limit exceeded)

verdict.summary: Gradle build runs out of memory. Project too large, too many modules, or JVM heap too small.

dead_ends.why_fails: Excessive heap hides the real problem (inefficient build) and slows down GC pauses

dead_ends.action: Disable Gradle daemon to reduce memory usage
dead_ends.why_fails: Daemon keeps JVM warm for faster builds. Disabling it makes every build slower.

workarounds.action: Increase Gradle JVM heap to reasonable size (4-8GB)
Enable Gradle configuration cache to reduce memory per build
Use modularization to reduce per-module build scope
